articles.headline: NZ ‘getting a cyclone season’: Cyclone Vaianu’s impacts felt across the North Island
articles.description: Two hundred and seventy households in Ōhope and Thornton had to evacuate.

articles.headline: Report: Federal Regulatory Compliance Costs $2 Trillion Annually
articles.description: Red tape issued by bureaucrats outstrips the impact of legislation.

articles.headline: A Necessary Critique of Fontcuberta’s Algorithmic Photography
articles.description: This March, Spanish conceptual artist and photographer Joan Fontcuberta published a new book in Italy. Immagini Latenti concludes with a chapter on AI and photography, referencing the debates surrounding Boris Eldagsen’s submission of an AI-generated image to…

articles.headline: Project Him Sarovar: Centre’s push for year-round water security in Ladakh
articles.description: A new initiative, Project Him Sarovar, is set to secure water for Ladakh. The project will build storage ponds to collect melting snow and glacial water. These ponds will support irrigation and rural water needs. The initiative also aims to develop a local mo…

articles.headline: “How Old Are We?”: McDonald’s CEO Blames His Mom For His Viral Big Arch Burger Reaction
articles.description: “Bro is grown, and he’s gonna blame his mom?” one comment read.
